svg.text: What SWRL is and how it works
?s = any Student individual | ?t = any Task individual | ? prefix = SWRL variable (works for any instance)
The 3 core SWRL rules in your emotion ontology
hasEmotion(?s, Anxiety) ∧ hasDifficulty(?t, High) ∧ hasTimePressure(?t, true)
SWRL vs plain OWL — what's the difference?
SWRL rules are written in OWL/XML and executed by a reasoner engine (e.g. Pellet, HermiT, Drools)
∧ means AND | ? prefix marks a variable that matches any individual
